channel.title: veganuary TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from veganuary

item.title: No plant milk upcharge = happiness 😌🌱 What's your go-to dairy-free milk? Comment below 👇 #vegan #coffee #dairyfree #oatmilk #Veganuary
item.description: No plant milk upcharge = happiness 😌🌱 What's your go-to dairy-free milk? Comment below 👇 #vegan #coffee #dairyfree #oatmilk #Veganuary

item.title: Happy Spring! We finally made it!🐣🌼 Spring is a time of new beginnings, so why not try vegan with us? Veganuary isn't just for January, you can join in anytime of year! 💚 Leave a 🌱 in the comments if you're eating plant-based this Spring! 🎥: @The Surge Sa
item.description: Happy Spring! We finally made it!🐣🌼 Spring is a time of new beginnings, so why not try vegan with us? Veganuary isn't just for January, you can join in anytime of year! 💚 Leave a 🌱 in the comments if you're eating plant-based this Spring! 🎥: @The Surge Sa

item.title: Spring is here, and with the new season comes new vegan food in UK supermarkets! 🛒 What's caught your eye? 👇 *Please note that at the time of posting, all products shown appeared to be vegan. We do our best, but labels and ingredients can change quickly.
item.description: Spring is here, and with the new season comes new vegan food in UK supermarkets! 🛒 What's caught your eye? 👇 *Please note that at the time of posting, all products shown appeared to be vegan. We do our best, but labels and ingredients can change quickly.

item.title: Support your local market 🌱 It's always fun to find new vegan products! Shout out your favorite local spot with vegan options in the comments! 👇 #vegan #groceryhaul #plantbased #Veganuary
item.description: Support your local market 🌱 It's always fun to find new vegan products! Shout out your favorite local spot with vegan options in the comments! 👇 #vegan #groceryhaul #plantbased #Veganuary

item.title: Homemade seitan in minutes 😋🌱 Just mix vital wheat gluten, nutritional yeast, soy sauce, and veggie broth. Then, steam it in some water with a splash of oil for five minutes… that’s it! Which seitan recipe are you making first? Comment below 👇 #vegan #sei
item.description: Homemade seitan in minutes 😋🌱 Just mix vital wheat gluten, nutritional yeast, soy sauce, and veggie broth. Then, steam it in some water with a splash of oil for five minutes… that’s it! Which seitan recipe are you making first? Comment below 👇 #vegan #sei

item.title: They are all just babies. 💔 This spring, let's remember the millions of young animals who never get to grow up and choose plant-based for them. 🌱 SHARE this to spread the word! 💚 Primary Sources: https://ahdb.org.uk/beef https://ukandeu.ac.uk/explainers/t
item.description: They are all just babies. 💔 This spring, let's remember the millions of young animals who never get to grow up and choose plant-based for them. 🌱 SHARE this to spread the word! 💚 Primary Sources: https://ahdb.org.uk/beef https://ukandeu.ac.uk/explainers/t

item.title: Perfect budget-friendly picnic sandwich on a baguette, filled with sliced tofu, pesto, arugula, and vegan mozzarella 🧺🥪🌱 What’s your go-to picnic food? Comment below 👇 #vegan #sandwich #traderjoes #veganuary
item.description: Perfect budget-friendly picnic sandwich on a baguette, filled with sliced tofu, pesto, arugula, and vegan mozzarella 🧺🥪🌱 What’s your go-to picnic food? Comment below 👇 #vegan #sandwich #traderjoes #veganuary

item.title: Just in time for Easter, we polled the Veganuary community to find the dairy-free chocolate that truly lives up to the hype; consider this your shopping list for the next time you crave something sweet! 🍫🌱 Did we miss your favourite? Let's keep the recomm
item.description: Just in time for Easter, we polled the Veganuary community to find the dairy-free chocolate that truly lives up to the hype; consider this your shopping list for the next time you crave something sweet! 🍫🌱 Did we miss your favourite? Let's keep the recomm

item.title: Best feeling ever ☀️ Life is really going to be okay What is your favorite farmers market? Tag them below 👇 #coffee #oatmilk #farmersmarket #Veganuary
item.description: Best feeling ever ☀️ Life is really going to be okay What is your favorite farmers market? Tag them below 👇 #coffee #oatmilk #farmersmarket #Veganuary

item.title: Choose kindness this Easter 🐑 Let's celebrate compassion for everyone with a plant-based plate. 🌱 Leave a ❤️ in the comments if you agree! 🎥: @rosesrefuge #lamb #friendsnotfood #easter #veganeaster #babysheep
item.description: Choose kindness this Easter 🐑 Let's celebrate compassion for everyone with a plant-based plate. 🌱 Leave a ❤️ in the comments if you agree! 🎥: @rosesrefuge #lamb #friendsnotfood #easter #veganeaster #babysheep

item.title: Here's what to get from Aldi to keep your iron levels up with no animal meat required! 🌱 Remember, a great way to guarantee you’re absorbing enough iron from plant foods is to eat a significant source of vitamin C with meals (such as an orange or orange j
item.description: Here's what to get from Aldi to keep your iron levels up with no animal meat required! 🌱 Remember, a great way to guarantee you’re absorbing enough iron from plant foods is to eat a significant source of vitamin C with meals (such as an orange or orange j

item.title: Dear younger me, your instincts were right all along… Deep down I think most of us always knew they are friends, not food. 💚 If you could tell your pre-vegan self one thing, what would it be? 👇 🎥: @happilyheiferafter @sisurefuge #animallovers #loveanimal
item.description: Dear younger me, your instincts were right all along… Deep down I think most of us always knew they are friends, not food. 💚 If you could tell your pre-vegan self one thing, what would it be? 👇 🎥: @happilyheiferafter @sisurefuge #animallovers #loveanimal

item.title: Here are just a few of our favourite plant-based positive news stories from the first part of 2026! 👇 1. Amsterdam has become the first capital city to ban meat and fossil fuel advertisements in public places, which includes billboards, trams, trains, bus
item.description: Here are just a few of our favourite plant-based positive news stories from the first part of 2026! 👇 1. Amsterdam has become the first capital city to ban meat and fossil fuel advertisements in public places, which includes billboards, trams, trains, bus

item.title: Top 5 horror movies... Vegan edition! What else would you add? #top5 #top5horrormovies #vegancommunity #vegan
item.description: Top 5 horror movies... Vegan edition! What else would you add? #top5 #top5horrormovies #vegancommunity #vegan

item.title: Hundreds of thousands of tonnes of abandoned fishing gear enter our oceans annually...⁠ ⁠ This "ghost gear," which is made from synthetic plastics, can remain in ocean ecosystems for hundreds of years or more, continuing to trap and kill marine life long
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of tonnes of abandoned fishing gear enter our oceans annually...⁠ ⁠ This "ghost gear," which is made from synthetic plastics, can remain in ocean ecosystems for hundreds of years or more, continuing to trap and kill marine life long

item.title: Who else can relate? 😋 What's your favorite plant-milk? Comment below 👇 #soymilk #plantmilk #coffee #dairyfree #Veganuary
item.description: Who else can relate? 😋 What's your favorite plant-milk? Comment below 👇 #soymilk #plantmilk #coffee #dairyfree #Veganuary

item.title: There are so many new vegan foods to try in UK supermarkets! 🛒 What would you try first? 👇 #veganfooduk #veganuk #lidlvegan #vegantesco #newveganproducts @Waitrose & Partners @Tesco @Sainsbury’s @candykittens @LidlGB @Alpro @Little Moons @Oatly @THIS @gr
item.description: There are so many new vegan foods to try in UK supermarkets! 🛒 What would you try first? 👇 #veganfooduk #veganuk #lidlvegan #vegantesco #newveganproducts @Waitrose & Partners @Tesco @Sainsbury’s @candykittens @LidlGB @Alpro @Little Moons @Oatly @THIS @gr

item.title: Did you know that most meat on plates is from baby animals, not just lambs? 🐑 No animal in the meat industry is allowed to see adulthood. They are slaughtered in adolescence. so really, they’re all babies. These individuals deserve to live long, full live
item.description: Did you know that most meat on plates is from baby animals, not just lambs? 🐑 No animal in the meat industry is allowed to see adulthood. They are slaughtered in adolescence. so really, they’re all babies. These individuals deserve to live long, full live

item.title: Here are 5 creatively tasty ways to use that tin of chickpeas at the back of your cupboard! 🌱 Which of these would you try? 👇 #chickpea #chickpeas #chickpeacookiedough #chickpeatuna #chickpeasalad
item.description: Here are 5 creatively tasty ways to use that tin of chickpeas at the back of your cupboard! 🌱 Which of these would you try? 👇 #chickpea #chickpeas #chickpeacookiedough #chickpeatuna #chickpeasalad

item.title: They are just trying to live their lives too. 💚 We can all make a difference for them! By switching to a plant-based diet, we can help reduce our impact on the environment and protect the natural beauty of this world and its wildlife. 🌱 SHARE this reminde
item.description: They are just trying to live their lives too. 💚 We can all make a difference for them! By switching to a plant-based diet, we can help reduce our impact on the environment and protect the natural beauty of this world and its wildlife. 🌱 SHARE this reminde

item.title: Running the marathon? Or just want some lean protein inspiration? We got you! Here's what to get from Tesco when you need lean protein with no animal meat required! 🌱 Which of these did you have last? Let us know! Primary source for vegan lean protein so
item.description: Running the marathon? Or just want some lean protein inspiration? We got you! Here's what to get from Tesco when you need lean protein with no animal meat required! 🌱 Which of these did you have last? Let us know! Primary source for vegan lean protein so

item.title: When you see the word "creamy" or a flavour like "steak," you might assume the product isn't plant-based. But the truth is "creamy" doesn't always mean dairy, and "meaty" flavours are often just a mix of herbs and spices. There are so many examples of thi
item.description: When you see the word "creamy" or a flavour like "steak," you might assume the product isn't plant-based. But the truth is "creamy" doesn't always mean dairy, and "meaty" flavours are often just a mix of herbs and spices. There are so many examples of thi

item.title: Things I wish I knew before going vegan 🌱 What’s the best advice you’ve gotten (or would give)? Drop it below and follow along for more support!👇 *Disclaimer: According to Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health, Protein – The Nutrition Source, it is p
item.description: Things I wish I knew before going vegan 🌱 What’s the best advice you’ve gotten (or would give)? Drop it below and follow along for more support!👇 *Disclaimer: According to Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health, Protein – The Nutrition Source, it is p

item.title: There are so many reasons to leave tuna off our plates, but here are just three! 🌱 1. The Oceana nationwide seafood fraud investigation (2010-2012) documented in a 2013 study that through DNA testing, 84% of fish sold as "white tuna" at U.S. restaurants a
item.description: There are so many reasons to leave tuna off our plates, but here are just three! 🌱 1. The Oceana nationwide seafood fraud investigation (2010-2012) documented in a 2013 study that through DNA testing, 84% of fish sold as "white tuna" at U.S. restaurants a

item.title: If children don’t understand nature, how can they protect it? Right now, nature is under growing pressure. Around 96% of the world’s mammal biomass is made up of humans and livestock, leaving only around 4% as wild mammals. Livestock production has major
item.description: If children don’t understand nature, how can they protect it? Right now, nature is under growing pressure. Around 96% of the world’s mammal biomass is made up of humans and livestock, leaving only around 4% as wild mammals. Livestock production has major

item.title: Here are just a few of our favourite recent positive news stories! 👇 1. In a major win for animals, Etsy has announced a ban on the sale of all animal fur effective August 2026. 💚 2. Sodexo UK and Ireland collaborated with Greener By Default to provide pl
item.description: Here are just a few of our favourite recent positive news stories! 👇 1. In a major win for animals, Etsy has announced a ban on the sale of all animal fur effective August 2026. 💚 2. Sodexo UK and Ireland collaborated with Greener By Default to provide pl

item.title: Act now to QUADRUPLE your impact for animals! Those cows you see grazing in fields during the summer? If raised for beef, many are killed before they even reach two years of age. They are gentle, sweet, curious animals who, if allowed to live naturally, c
item.description: Act now to QUADRUPLE your impact for animals! Those cows you see grazing in fields during the summer? If raised for beef, many are killed before they even reach two years of age. They are gentle, sweet, curious animals who, if allowed to live naturally, c

item.title: Watch the full story of what happens when a father and daughter take a 600-mile road trip to give a calf a forever home! The documentary short 'Cow Trip' is available now on The Dodo's YouTube channel. 🎥 SHARE this with a friend to brighten their day! 🥰 C
item.description: Watch the full story of what happens when a father and daughter take a 600-mile road trip to give a calf a forever home! The documentary short 'Cow Trip' is available now on The Dodo's YouTube channel. 🎥 SHARE this with a friend to brighten their day! 🥰 C

item.title: We’re leaving the pressure behind. 🌱 Vegan eating can be simple, flexible, and realistic. What would you add to the “in” category? Comment below 👇 #vegan #plantbased #realistic #Veganuary
item.description: We’re leaving the pressure behind. 🌱 Vegan eating can be simple, flexible, and realistic. What would you add to the “in” category? Comment below 👇 #vegan #plantbased #realistic #Veganuary
